title: nicotiana suaveolens var. rotundifolia
intro: Nicotiana suaveolens var. rotundifolia, also known as sweet tobacco or sweet flowering tobacco, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural expectorant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and sore throats.
